name: URL Decoder and SQL Injection Analyzer
description: Decodes URL-encoded payloads from web alerts and uses LLM to analyze them for SQL injection attack patterns, techniques, and risk levels. Adds structured enrichment to alert.enrichments.url_analysis.
directive: You are a cybersecurity analyst specializing in SQL injection attacks. Analyze URLs and decoded payloads to identify SQL injection patterns, attack techniques, and risk levels. Provide concise, actionable assessments focusing on attack type, payload purpose, and risk level.

data_samples.name: Classic SQL Injection with OR 1=1
data_samples.description: URL-encoded SQL injection using classic OR 1=1 bypass technique

data_samples.name: Quote Manipulation SQL Injection
data_samples.description: SQL injection using quote manipulation with OR 'x'='x' pattern

input.title: SQL Injection Attempt with Quote Manipulation

finding_info.title: SQL Injection Attempt with Quote Manipulation
